title: The Island Faces Impact

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Fishman Island is in your hands!!!

summary: The Island Faces Impact. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
